rload result
============

Summary
Requests completed <value>
Bytes read <value>
Response body bytes <value>
Load window <value>
Drain time <value>

Throughput
Requests/sec <value>
Load requests/sec <value>

Latency
Average <value>
Minimum <value>
Maximum <value>
Median <value>
Percentile Value
<value> <value>
<value> <value>
<value> <value>
<value> <value>
<value> <value>
Correction interval <value>

Errors
HTTP status <value>
Socket total <value>
connect <value>
read <value>
write <value>
timeout <value>

Breakdowns
Methods
GET <value> requests <value> errors min <value> max <value> avg <value> median <value>
HTTP statuses
<value> <value> responses
URI Top <value> (estimated)
<value> ± <value> /beauty
